data.title: Lusha: Find Verified B2B Contacts Instantly
data.excerpt: Discover Lusha, the B2B data platform that finds verified emails and phone numbers from LinkedIn. Start for free today and boost your sales!

$media.alt: Lusha: Find Verified B2B Contacts Instantly

children.text: What is Lusha?

Lusha is a top-tier B2B data platform that transforms how sales and marketing teams find decision-makers. Instead of sifting through endless profiles or guessing emails, Lusha delivers verified contact information—emails and phone numbers—directly from LinkedIn with a simple browser extension. It's built for accuracy and speed, ensuring you connect with the right people without delay. I remember when I first tried it: within seconds, I had a verified email for a prospect I'd been struggling to reach. That moment sold me on its power. If you're tired of unreliable data,
give Lusha a try for free
and see how it streamlines your outreach.
Key Features That Make Lusha Stand Out

Lusha packs a suite of features designed to elevate your sales game. From verified emails and phone numbers to advanced filters and company insights, every tool is crafted for precision. For instance, the bulk enrichment feature lets you upload CSV files and enrich hundreds of contacts in minutes—perfect for scaling campaigns. The AI assistant helps craft personalized messages, while automated email sequences save hours of manual work. Plus, with call recordings and AI insights, you can analyze conversations to refine your pitch. What I love is how Lusha integrates seamlessly with CRM systems like Salesforce, keeping your data synchronized and actionable. Explore more about its
new features and updates
to stay ahead.
Who is Lusha Ideal For?

Lusha isn't just for sales reps; it's a game-changer for any B2B team. If you're in sales development, account management, or marketing, this platform cuts through the noise to deliver hot leads. It's ideal for startups needing affordable data enrichment, enterprises looking for scalable solutions, and anyone who values accuracy over guesswork. For example, a marketing team used Lusha to build targeted lists for a webinar, resulting in a 30% higher registration rate. Whether you're prospecting, nurturing leads, or closing deals, Lusha fits right into your workflow. Discover
specific use cases
that showcase its versatility.
How Lusha Works: A Step-by-Step Look

Using Lusha is straightforward. Install the Chrome extension, browse LinkedIn profiles, and click the Lusha icon to reveal verified contacts. You can then save details to your CRM or export them for campaigns. The platform offers flexible pricing, starting with a generous free plan that includes 40 credits per month—no credit card required. For more power, the Starter plan at $44.95 per month (billed yearly) adds features like lookalikes and AI assistance. The Pro and Premium plans scale with your needs, offering API access and bulk tools for larger teams. I've found the credit system transparent, letting you pay for what you use. Ready to dive in?
Check out the plans and start enriching your data
Why Choose Lusha Over Other Tools?

In a crowded market, Lusha shines with its focus on accuracy and user experience. While other platforms might overwhelm you with features, Lusha keeps things simple yet powerful. The data verification process ensures high deliverability rates, reducing bounce backs in email campaigns. I've seen teams cut prospecting time in half because Lusha eliminates the trial-and-error of manual research. Plus, its integration with tools like ClickUp and monday.com means you can connect your workflows without hassle. Learn
why many choose Lusha
for their sales intelligence needs.
Flexible Pricing for Every Team

Lusha's pricing adapts to your growth. The Free plan is perfect for testing, while Starter suits small teams. Pro adds seats and advanced features, and Premium offers everything with massive credit allowances. Annual billing gives a 25% discount, making it cost-effective for long-term use. I appreciate how Lusha scales with you—whether you're a solo entrepreneur or a sales department, there's a plan that fits. No hidden fees, just clear value. See
tips for getting the most out of your plan
to maximize ROI.
Getting Started Today

Jumping into Lusha takes minutes. Sign up for a free account, install the extension, and start enriching profiles immediately. The onboarding is intuitive, with tutorials to guide you. I recommend beginning with the free credits to test the waters—you'll quickly see the impact on your pipeline. For teams, the collaborative features allow multiple users to work efficiently. Don't miss out on transforming your contact data.
Sign up for Lusha now
and join thousands of professionals who trust it daily.

children.text: How does Lusha verify contact information?
Lusha uses advanced algorithms and real-time checks to validate emails and phone numbers, ensuring high accuracy and reducing bounce rates for your outreach.
Can I use Lusha with my existing CRM software?
Yes, Lusha integrates seamlessly with popular CRMs like Salesforce, HubSpot, and others, allowing you to enrich contacts directly in your workflow.
What makes Lusha different from other B2B data tools?
Lusha stands out with its user-friendly browser extension, focus on verified data, and flexible pricing that scales with your team's needs, making it both powerful and accessible.
